emotionalDirection.statement: Capture the roar of victory and the unity that earned it.

storyAngle: A season of teamwork that became a championship.

primaryMessage.guidance: Set as the dominant statement, second only to the hero photo.

secondaryMessage.guidance: Refined supporting label (often gold); never competes with the primary message.

heroStrategy.rationale: Photo c1 (trophy_lift.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 93, 1 clear subject.
heroStrategy.supportingRole: All supporting photos frame and lead the eye back to the hero; none competes with it.

hierarchy.role: Carry the strongest supporting emotion, just beneath the hero.
Advance the narrative and connect moments.

supportingPhotoStrategy.guidance: Beauty over quantity — cut any supporting photo that weakens the composition or crowds the hero.

colorDirection.guidance: Build on the photos' own palette, kept in harmony with the Obsidian/Gold/Ivory brand core.

typographyDirection.guidance: Large, opulent display type in gold gradients; letter-spaced small-caps labels.

compositionDirection.layout: Dramatic spotlighted hero with luxurious negative space and gold framing.
compositionDirection.guidance: Whitespace is intentional; the eye must always find the hero first.

decorativeDirection.guidance: Decoration must serve emotion or hierarchy — otherwise remove it.

productIntent.guidance: Lead toward the standard print as a display-worthy keepsake. (Descriptive only — no pricing.)

audienceIntent.primaryAudience: the team, players, and their families
audienceIntent.sharingContext: shared across the team and fans
audienceIntent.guidance: Let audience and sharing context shape tone and shareability.

wowTargets.guidance: Never present a concept below 90; push hardest on the emphasized categories.
